title: Singapore Entry Visa Application (Form 14A)
description: Give the details for a Singapore entry visa application: the visa a national of a visa-required country/territory needs before travelling to Singapore. Singapore does not accept visa applications at the immigration checkpoint or over the counter, and does not offer a direct applicant self-service portal; every application is submitted on the applicant's behalf by a Singapore-resident local contact (a Singapore Citizen, Permanent Resident, or a Singapore-registered company/hotel) or an authorised visa agent/overseas mission, using the Immigration & Checkpoints Authority's (ICA) online SAVE (Submission of Application for Visa Electronically) e-Service or, where no such intermediary is available, a paper submission through an authorised visa agent or the nearest Singapore overseas mission. This document models ICA's own canonical Form 14A ('Application for Entry Visa') that the applicant completes, plus Form V39A ('Letter of Introduction for Visa Application') that the local contact or company completes and signs to introduce the applicant. It does not model the authenticated SAVE e-Service screens themselves, which are gated behind the local contact's Singpass or the company's Corppass account; the live source is always authoritative.

source.documentRef: Form 14A — Application for Entry Visa (Immigration Act 1959, Section 55(1)), plus Form V39A — Letter of Introduction for Visa Application (https://www.ica.gov.sg/docs/default-source/ica/forms/formv39a.pdf)

verification.notes: Closes the Visa vertical's last remaining gap (GOV-822 research cycle; Visa was 8/9 after GOV-815 authored de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application, with SG the sole remaining jurisdiction). ICA's SAVE e-Service (eservices.ica.gov.sg) requires a Singpass (individual local contact) or Corppass (company/hotel local contact) login before any data-entry screen renders, the same login-gated-form class already recorded elsewhere in this registry (e.g. nz/dia/realme-verified-identity, de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application). Per source-of-truth fidelity, this document was instead authored field-by-field from ICA's own canonical Form 14A and Form V39A PDFs, which SAVE is confirmed to digitise 1:1 (ICA's e-Visa media release: local contacts 'no longer need to submit the application form and supporting document to ICA' in person). Status remains 'draft' pending a field-by-field pass against the authenticated SAVE e-Service itself. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: submissionChannel
fields.label: How will this application be submitted?

enum: Local contact with Singpass via SAVE
Company or hotel local contact with Corppass via SAVE

fields.description: ICA does not accept visa applications submitted directly by the applicant or over the counter. Determines which route (and which of the localContact* fields below) applies. Not itself a box on Form 14A; captured because an agent preparing this application needs to know which intermediary route is available before the form's own fields are relevant.
fields.sourceRef: ICA — Check if You Need an Entry Visa (visa_requirements) and e-Visa media release

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: Name (full name as shown in travel document)

fields.name: spouseStatus
fields.label: Nationality/citizenship of spouse
fields.description: Whether the applicant's spouse is a Singapore Citizen, Singapore Permanent Resident (each requiring the spouse's NRIC number), or of another nationality (please specify).

fields.name: race
fields.label: Race (e.g. Malay, Indian, Chinese, Caucasian, etc)

fields.name: prcIdNumber
fields.label: PRC ID number (for Chinese nationals only)
fields.description: Applicable only where nationalityCitizenship is Chinese.

fields.name: countryPlaceOfOriginResidence
fields.label: Country/place of origin/residence
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part I (Address in Country/Place of Origin/Residence)

fields.name: divisionStateProvinceOfOriginResidence
fields.label: Division/state/province of origin/residence
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part I (Address in Country/Place of Origin/Residence)

fields.name: prefectureOfOriginResidence
fields.label: Prefecture of origin/residence
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part I (Address in Country/Place of Origin/Residence)

fields.name: countyDistrictOfOriginResidence
fields.label: County/district of origin/residence
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part I (Address in Country/Place of Origin/Residence)

fields.name: addressOfOriginResidence
fields.label: Address (in country/place of origin/residence)
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part I (Address in Country/Place of Origin/Residence)

fields.name: expectedDateOfArrival
fields.label: Expected date of arrival in Singapore

fields.name: intendedLengthOfStay
fields.label: How long do you intend to stay in Singapore?

fields.name: longerStayReasonAndDuration
fields.label: If your intended stay is more than 30 days, state the reason and the duration

fields.name: singaporeAddressType
fields.label: Where will you be staying in Singapore?

fields.name: residedElsewhereLastFiveYears
fields.label: Did you reside in other countries/places, other than your country/place of origin, for one year or more during the last 5 years?

fields.name: priorResidenceDetails
fields.label: Period of stay, country/place, and address of prior residence(s)
fields.description: One row per country/place on the source form's table (period of stay, country/place, address, from, to). This document collapses the repeating table into a single free-text field, the same treatment used elsewhere in this registry for small repeating tables (e.g. de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application's previousStaysDetails).

fields.name: hasTravellingCompanion
fields.label: Is the applicant travelling with a companion?
fields.description: Only applicable where the applicant is 12 years old or younger at the point of application. Details are not required if the applicant is accompanied by an airline representative.
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part II (Details of Travelling Companion)

fields.name: companionRelationshipToApplicant
fields.label: Relationship of travelling companion to applicant
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part II (Details of Travelling Companion)

fields.name: companionName
fields.label: Name of travelling companion
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part II (Details of Travelling Companion)

fields.name: companionDateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth of travelling companion
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part II (Details of Travelling Companion)

fields.name: companionSex
fields.label: Sex of travelling companion
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part II (Details of Travelling Companion)

fields.name: companionNationality
fields.label: Nationality/citizenship of travelling companion
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part II (Details of Travelling Companion)

fields.name: companionTravelDocumentNumber
fields.label: Travel document number of travelling companion
fields.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part II (Details of Travelling Companion)

fields.name: localContactType
fields.label: Is the local contact an individual, or a company/hotel?
fields.description: Form V39A (Letter of Introduction for Visa Application) is completed and signed differently depending on whether the local contact is an individual or a company/hotel.

fields.name: localContactName
fields.label: Name of local contact / company / hotel

fields.name: localContactRelationshipToApplicant
fields.label: Relationship of local contact/company/hotel to applicant
fields.description: Form V39A gives example categories: father, mother, brother, sister, son, daughter, spouse, business partner; for others, please specify.

fields.name: localContactCompanyRepresentativeDetails
fields.label: Name, NRIC no. and designation/capacity of the person acting on behalf of the company/firm

fields.name: localContactAddress
fields.label: Address of local contact / company name and address

fields.name: embarkationCountryPlace
fields.label: Country/place of embarkation (coming to Singapore from)

fields.name: previouslyRefusedEntryOrDeported
fields.label: Has ever been refused entry into or deported from any country/place, including Singapore?

fields.name: previouslyConvictedInCourt
fields.label: Has ever been convicted in a court of law in any country/place, including Singapore?

fields.name: previouslyProhibitedFromEnteringSingapore
fields.label: Has ever been prohibited from entering Singapore?

fields.name: previouslyEnteredSingaporeUsingDifferentParticulars
fields.label: Has entered Singapore using a different name, sex, nationality/citizenship, or date of birth?

fields.name: previousParticularsUsed
fields.label: Details of the different name, sex, nationality/citizenship, or date of birth previously used to enter Singapore

fields.name: antecedentDetails
fields.label: If any of the above answers is yes, please furnish details

documents.label: Passport-size photograph, affixed to the application
documents.sourceRef: Form 14A — page 1 header: 'Affix a recent passport-size photograph here'

documents.label: Signed declaration by the applicant that the application's particulars are true, accurate and complete
documents.statement: I declare that all information submitted in this application is true, accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge and belief. I understand that, if I have concealed relevant information or provided false, inaccurate or misleading information, I may be prosecuted and any facilities, rights or privileges granted under this application may be withdrawn.
documents.sourceRef: Form 14A — Part V, Declaration by Applicant, signed and dated by the applicant

documents.label: Signed Letter of Introduction for Visa Application (Form V39A) from the local contact or company
documents.sourceRef: Form V39A, signed either by the local contact (individual) or by a person acting on behalf of the company/firm, dated

steps.title: Address in country/place of origin or residence
